title: Topcoder Community App - Universal Nav: Different "type" for /thrive path
summary:
### Overview

The Topcoder Community App is the main application used to display challenges, handle registration, and accept submissions on the Topcoder platform.

You can find the source code here:

https://github.com/topcoder-platform/community-app

### Local deployment

Instructions for deploying and building the community app locally can be found here:

https://platform-ui.topcoder.com/dev-cen

artifacts.patch_diff_unified:
diff --git a/service/handler.py b/service/handler.py
--- a/service/handler.py
+++ b/service/handler.py
@@
-    result = legacy_api(payload)
+    result = modern_api(payload)
risks: Monitor modern_api latency before fully cutting over
Rollback by redeploying previous tag if error rate increases

plan: Draft diff touching affected files with validation commands.
validations: SELF_CHECK: Mock diff/test plan generated for demonstration.
